best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-login-001 title: verify successful login module: authentication source pages: 1, 6 preconditions: user has valid credentials. test data: valid username and password. test steps: 1. user enters valid credentials. 2. application requests credentials. 3. application sends credentials to the server. 4. server verifies credentials with the database. 5. server confirms credentials match. 6. application informs the user that the login is successful. expected result: user is logged in successfully.

item_text: utente gia' registrato?: si -> login; no -> registrazione

test case id: tc-login-002 title: verify failed login module: authentication source pages: 1, 6 preconditions: user has invalid credentials. test data: invalid username and password. test steps: 1. user enters invalid credentials. 2. application requests credentials. 3. application sends credentials to the server. 4. server verifies credentials with the database. 5. server confirms credentials do not match. 6. application informs the user that the login failed. expected result: user is informed that the login failed.

item_text: visualizza report settimanale?: si -> report settimanale
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-statistics-001 title: verify weekly report visualization module: statistics source pages: 3 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. user views statistics. 2. system prompts to visualize a weekly report. 3. user chooses to visualize the report. 4. system displays the weekly report. 5. system asks if the user wants to change sections. 6. user chooses not to change sections. 7. system returns to the statistics view. expected result: user sees the weekly report and remains in the statistics view.

item_text: visualizza report settimanale?: no -> menu orizzontale

item_text: vuoi cambiare sezione?: si -> menu orizzontale
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-statistics-006 title: verify data available for horizontal menu module: statistics source pages: 3 preconditions: there is data available for the horizontal menu. test data: valid horizontal menu data. test steps: 1. user decides to change sections. 2. system confirms there is data available for the horizontal menu. 3. system displays the horizontal menu. 4. user returns to the statistics view. expected result: user sees the horizontal menu and returns to the statistics view.
